name: phone-a-friend
description: CLI relay that lets AI coding agents collaborate by sending prompts and repository context to backend agents.

interface.shortDescription: Relay prompts to other AI coding backends
interface.longDescription: Phone a Friend is a relay CLI that lets AI coding agents collaborate. From inside Codex, ask Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, or Ollama for second opinions, code reviews, and iterative refinement. The /phone-a-team workflow runs multi-model rounds with Bash-orchestrated synthesis between rounds, no subagent primitive required. Marketplace install ships the skills (/phone-a-friend, /curiosity-engine, /phone-a-team). For the full CLI (TUI, agentic mode, web dashboard) install with `npm install -g @freibergergarcia/phone-a-friend`.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude through phone-a-friend for a sanity review of this repo
Spin up reviewers across Claude and Gemini to debate this change
Iterate this implementation with phone-a-team across multiple backends
